channel.title: Sprint 3: WordPress Comments research
channel.description:
# Sprint 3 planning
This is what we’re planning to do in sprint 3: we’ll finish the bugs and features started on the previous sprint and add a few more. Quick summary:
* Planned - 77pt of which aprox 28pt are supposed to be done from previous sprint: * In progress from previous sprint - 9pt, that after releasing would mean 37pt. * Not started Bugs - 8pt * Not started features - 11pt * Not started research - 21pt
[**- Sprint board**](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/5)
## **Bugs**
* Head Tags fails when HTML of `<head>` is malformed [3pt] - https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/27 * actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists [3pt] - [https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/365 ](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/365) * actions.source.fetch with “force: true” doesn’t work as expected [3pt] - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/340 * Frontity doesn’t work with Semantic UI [8pt] - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/405
## **Feature Discussions in development:**
* [ComScore analytics package (beta version)](https://community.frontity.org/t/comscore-analytics-package/1435). * [Change publicPath](https://community.frontity.org/t/change-publicpath/1461). * [Slot and Fill](https://community.frontity.org/t/slot-and-fill/895).
## **Feature Discussions in research:**
* [WordPress Comments Package](https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-comments-package/1267) * [E2E testing that requires WordPress instances](https://community.frontity.org/t/e2e-testing-that-requires-wordpress-instances/1756) --- # Sprint 3 Review For a more detailed status you can check the [GitHub board](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/5). You can find the information of the last release at [this announcement](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-improve-lazy-loading-in-frontity/1927).
Note that, as we're doing the release after the end of the sprint, some issues may be included as released in the announcement and not in this review.
## Frontity team review **Released - 3pt** * [Head Tags fails when HTML of `<head>` is malformed [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/27)
**In progress - 39pt**
We estimate that most of these points, except 4-5, are already done as they are pending review. * [Research - WP Comments [20pt]](https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-comments-package/1267): We just have to write down properly the implementation proposal, but the research is already done and the feature ready to be implemented. * [Add publicPath option to CLI and pass it down to Webpack in both the build and dev commands [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/420): Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished. Part of [change publicPath](https://community.frontity.org/t/change-publicpath/1461) feature. * [actions.source.fetch with "force: true" doesn't work as expected [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/389): Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished. * [actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/389): Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished. * [Create the useFills hook [5pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/430): This is supposed to be done, maybe 1pt is left because we have to review everything once [`useConnect ` hook](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/404) is merged. * [Create ComScore beta package [5pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/416): Most of the development is already done, just the e2e tests are left. So we estimate that approximately 2/5 pt are left.
**Not started - 35pt** * [Create the Slot component [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/395): Part of the [Slot and Fill](https://community.frontity.org/t/slot-and-fill/895) feature. * [Add ENV variables for the build, dev and serve commands. [3pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/394) * [Frontity doesn't work with Semantic UI [8pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/405) * [Research - E2E testing that requires WordPress instances [21pt]](https://community.frontity.org/t/e2e-testing-that-requires-wordpress-instances/1756)
## External development **In progress** * [useConnect hook](https://community.frontity.org/t/useconnect-hook/1079): Edu has been working on this and it's already done and approved. @David has been working on [the docs](https://github.com/frontity/gitbook-docs/pull/61) and there are just few minor changes left. * [Reimplementation of `useInView` hook](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/413): Edu worked on this and it's already done, although we should wait until `useConnect` hook is merged. * [Robots.txt package](https://community.frontity.org/t/robots-txt-package/1074): This is an external contribution. [Koli14](https://github.com/Koli14) created [this Pull Request](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/422) to develop this feature. The code is great and @mmczaplinski helped him with the tests and the docs. Apart from that he created another [Pull Request](https://github.com/frontity/now-builder/pull/23) to update our `now/builder`. This one is pending review and once it's approved everything should be ready to be merged. * [useInfiniteScroll hook](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/429): Edu is still working on this one.

item.title: Sprint 3: WordPress Comments research
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 3 planning

This is what we’re planning to do in sprint 3: we’ll finish the bugs and features started on the previous sprint and add a few more. Quick summary:

  • Planned - 77pt of which aprox 28pt are supposed to be done from previous sprint:
    • In progress from previous sprint - 9pt, that after releasing would mean 37pt.
    • Not started Bugs - 8pt
    • Not started features - 11pt
    • Not started research - 21pt

- Sprint board

Bugs

  • Head Tags fails when HTML of <head> is malformed [3pt] - https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/27
  • actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists [3pt] - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/365
  • actions.source.fetch with “force: true” doesn’t work as expected [3pt] - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/340
  • Frontity doesn’t work with Semantic UI [8pt] - https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/405

Feature Discussions in development:

  • ComScore analytics package (beta version).
  • Change publicPath.
  • Slot and Fill.

Feature Discussions in research:

  • WordPress Comments Package
  • E2E testing that requires WordPress instances

Sprint 3 Review

For a more detailed status you can check the GitHub board. You can find the information of the last release at this announcement.

Note that, as we’re doing the release after the end of the sprint, some issues may be included as released in the announcement and not in this review.

Frontity team review

Released - 3pt

  • Head Tags fails when HTML of <head> is malformed [3pt]

In progress - 39pt

We estimate that most of these points, except 4-5, are already done as they are pending review.

  • Research - WP Comments [20pt]: We just have to write down properly the implementation proposal, but the research is already done and the feature ready to be implemented.
  • Add publicPath option to CLI and pass it down to Webpack in both the build and dev commands [3pt]: Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished. Part of change publicPath feature.
  • actions.source.fetch with “force: true” doesn’t work as expected [3pt]: Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished.
  • actions.source.fetch should populate link, route, page and query even if data exists [3pt]: Pending review, this is supposed to be already finished.
  • Create the useFills hook [5pt]: This is supposed to be done, maybe 1pt is left because we have to review everything once useConnect hook is merged.
  • Create ComScore beta package [5pt]: Most of the development is already done, just the e2e tests are left. So we estimate that approximately 2/5 pt are left.

Not started - 35pt

  • Create the Slot component [3pt]: Part of the Slot and Fill feature.
  • Add ENV variables for the build, dev and serve commands. [3pt]
  • Frontity doesn’t work with Semantic UI [8pt]
  • Research - E2E testing that requires WordPress instances [21pt]

External development

In progress

  • useConnect hook: Edu has been working on this and it’s already done and approved. @David has been working on the docs and there are just few minor changes left.
  • Reimplementation of useInView hook: Edu worked on this and it’s already done, although we should wait until useConnect hook is merged.
  • Robots.txt package: This is an external contribution. Koli14 created this Pull Request to develop this feature. The code is great and @mmczaplinski helped him with the tests and the docs. Apart from that he created another Pull Request to update our now/builder. This one is pending review and once it’s approved everything should be ready to be merged.
  • useInfiniteScroll hook: Edu is still working on this one.

Read full topic
